linting.notes: Linting is enforced via GitHub Actions (ci-pr-checks.yaml). golangci-lint has extensive rules including bodyclose, errcheck, govet, staticcheck, revive, and custom formatters (goimports, gofmt). The Makefile supports LINT_NEW_ONLY=true to only check new code, but CI defaults to checking all code.

testing.test_directory: Multiple: pkg/**/*, test/e2e/, test/integration/, test/sidecar/e2e/, test/config/
setup_required: apt-get update && apt-get install -y libzmq3-dev g++ make git pkg-config
testing.mock_patterns: Uses Ginkgo BeforeSuite/AfterSuite for test setup/teardown. E2E tests create Kind clusters or use existing K8s contexts.

test_types.e2e: make test-e2e (requires Kind cluster, Docker/Podman, images)

testing.notes: Unit tests are fast and self-contained. E2E tests require a Kubernetes cluster (creates Kind cluster by default) and container images. Integration tests use the integration_tests build tag. Tests use Ginkgo v2 framework for BDD-style testing. The project has two main components: epp (endpoint picker) and sidecar (routing proxy), each with separate test suites.

ci_setup: Install system dependencies: libzmq3-dev, g++, pkg-config
ci.notes: CI uses paths-filter to skip lint/test when no source code changes. Uses golangci/golangci-lint-action@v9 with version v2.8.0. The workflow requires signed commits via GPG/SSH. E2E tests are run via 'make test' which includes both unit and e2e tests. CI also uses Tekton pipelines (.tekton/) for container builds in production.

build.build_command: make build (builds both epp and sidecar: go build -o bin/epp cmd/epp/main.go && go build -o bin/pd-sidecar cmd/pd-sidecar/main.go)

build_individual.epp: make build-epp OR go build -o bin/epp cmd/epp/main.go
build_individual.sidecar: make build-sidecar OR go build -o bin/pd-sidecar cmd/pd-sidecar/main.go

container_build.epp: make image-build-epp OR podman/docker build -f Dockerfile.epp -t ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-inference-scheduler:dev .
container_build.sidecar: make image-build-sidecar OR podman/docker build -f Dockerfile.sidecar -t ghcr.io/llm-d/llm-d-routing-sidecar:dev .

build.notes: The project requires ZeroMQ for message passing between components. Build artifacts are placed in bin/. The Makefile includes separate files: Makefile.tools.mk (tooling), Makefile.cluster.mk (K8s deployment), Makefile.kind.mk (Kind cluster management). Container images can be built for multiple platforms via PLATFORMS variable.

conventions.test_naming: Go standard: TestXxx for test functions, uses Ginkgo Describe/Context/It blocks for BDD-style tests
conventions.import_style: Grouped imports: standard library, external packages, internal packages. Uses goimports for auto-formatting.
conventions.code_style: Enforced via golangci-lint with gofmt and goimports formatters
conventions.commit_requirements: Signed commits required (GPG or SSH signatures)
conventions.notes: Uses OWNERS files for code review assignments. Follows standard Go project layout. Heavy use of Kubernetes client-go patterns and controller-runtime.

test_commands.notes: SUCCESS - All epp unit tests passed (7 packages, ~5s total)
SUCCESS - All sidecar unit tests passed (1 package, ~20s)

container_recipe.notes: The Go 1.25.7 requirement is handled automatically via GOTOOLCHAIN=auto. ZMQ headers and libraries are required at build time due to CGO_ENABLED=1. Unit tests are fast and require no external infrastructure. E2E tests (not validated here) require Kind cluster and container images.

validation.summary: All validation steps passed: deps install OK, build OK, lint OK (0 issues), typos OK, unit tests OK (7 packages, all passed in ~25s total). E2E tests not run (require Kubernetes cluster).

gaps: E2E tests require a Kubernetes cluster (Kind or existing cluster) and cannot be validated in a simple container without significant infrastructure

No coverage threshold configured or enforced
Container image build was not validated (requires multi-stage build with specific base images)
The test-e2e Makefile target has additional dependencies (images, Kind cluster setup) that make it unsuitable for quick validation

additional_notes.kubernetes_dependency: This project is a Kubernetes-native application that implements an inference scheduler/router for LLM workloads. It uses Gateway API and custom CRDs. Full testing requires a K8s cluster.

components.epp: Endpoint Picker - schedules inference requests across multiple backends
components.sidecar: Routing sidecar proxy - handles request routing and profiling

additional_notes.external_dependencies: Requires external services for full functionality: Istio/Envoy for routing, Gateway API implementation, vLLM inference backends, UDS tokenizer service
additional_notes.test_infrastructure: E2E tests create ephemeral Kind clusters and load container images. Tests are well-structured with clear separation between unit, integration, and e2e tests.
